calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-24-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
James M. Treppa, Esq. for Plaintiff: Vance Meredith, Jr., also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Kash McCoy aka Johanes Davidson.
After hearing the tetimony presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 235 Bridgeview Road, San Francisco.
Lease is forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $3,980.00
Attorney's Fees and Costs per Motion.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JAMES TREPPA FOR PLAINTIFF VANCE MEREDITH
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KASH MCCOY

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TO PROCEED TO TRIAL

JUDGE:OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
